ingredients.name: Resveratrol

ingredients.name: Collagen

ingredients.description: Supports bone health, immune function, and healthy inflammatory balance.

ingredients.name: Niacinamide

ingredients.name: Ashwagandha

ingredients.name: Bioactive Peptides

studies.title: 12-Week Double-Blind Study of Advanced Age-Defy Formula in Adults Aged 40–60
studies.summary_short: Randomized, double-blind, placebo-controlled trial evaluating skin smoothness and energy in adults aged 40–60 over 12 weeks of Advanced Age-Defy Formula use.
studies.summary_full: In this 12-week double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical study, 168 participants aged 40–60 were randomized to receive either Advanced Age-Defy Formula or placebo. Primary endpoints included changes in crow’s-feet wrinkle depth, global facial smoothness, and self-reported daytime energy. Secondary endpoints assessed collagen density via high-frequency ultrasound and quality-of-life measures. Participants taking Advanced Age-Defy Formula showed statistically significant improvements in wrinkle depth and perceived energy compared with placebo by week 8, which were maintained through week 12.

studies.title: 16-Week Collagen Supplementation and Skin Elasticity in Adults 35–55
studies.summary_short: Open-label study examining the effects of daily collagen powder on skin elasticity and hydration over 16 weeks.
studies.summary_full: This 16-week open-label study enrolled 92 adults aged 35–55 with self-reported dry or photoaged skin. Participants consumed a daily serving of collagen powder with vitamin C and hyaluronic acid. Skin elasticity, hydration, and fine-line appearance were measured at baseline, week 8, and week 16. Progressive improvements in skin elasticity and hydration were observed, with the largest gains recorded between weeks 8 and 16.

studies.title: 8-Week Evaluation of Energy and Cognitive Focus Support in Adults 30–55
studies.summary_short: Placebo-controlled study assessing self-reported fatigue and focus after 8 weeks of a caffeine-containing energy supplement.
studies.summary_full: In this 8-week randomized, double-blind study, 120 adults aged 30–55 reporting mild to moderate fatigue were assigned to either a caffeine-containing energy formula or placebo. Outcomes included validated fatigue scales, attention tasks, and daily productivity ratings. The active group reported significant reductions in fatigue scores and improvements in sustained attention relative to placebo by week 4, maintained through week 8.

studies.title: 12-Week Observational Study of Sleep Quality in Adults 45–70
studies.summary_short: Observational study tracking changes in sleep quality and next-day alertness with nightly use of a sleep support gummy.
studies.summary_full: This 12-week observational study followed 104 adults aged 45–70 who elected to use a melatonin- and magnesium-based sleep support gummy. Participants completed weekly sleep diaries and standardized questionnaires on sleep quality, sleep onset latency, and next-day alertness. Most participants reported improvements in sleep onset and perceived sleep quality within the first 2–3 weeks, with benefits sustained over 12 weeks.

studies.title: Mechanistic Overview of Resveratrol and Cellular Aging Pathways
studies.summary_short: Narrative review of resveratrol’s effects on sirtuins, oxidative stress, and mitochondrial function.
studies.summary_full: This mechanism-focused review summarizes preclinical and clinical data on how resveratrol influences sirtuin activation, oxidative stress responses, and mitochondrial biogenesis. The paper details proposed mechanisms by which resveratrol may modulate cellular aging pathways, including effects on AMPK signaling, NAD+ balance, and inflammatory mediators.

studies.title: Overview of Nutritional Strategies for Healthy Aging
studies.summary_short: High-level overview of key nutrients and lifestyle factors linked to healthy aging.
studies.summary_full: This overview summarizes current evidence on nutritional and lifestyle strategies for supporting healthy aging, including protein intake, omega-3 fatty acids, antioxidants, sleep hygiene, and physical activity. It highlights how multi-ingredient formulations may complement foundational habits.

articles.title: Collagen After 50: How to Support Smoother, Firmer Skin
articles.excerpt: Discover how collagen, vitamin C, and daily habits work together to visibly soften wrinkles in your 50s and beyond.
articles.body:
As we move through our 50s, natural collagen production slows, which can translate into more visible fine lines, crepiness, and dryness. The good news: targeted collagen support and a few key lifestyle shifts can make a meaningful difference.

In this guide, we explain how collagen and vitamin C work together, which types of collagen are best studied for skin, and how to build a simple daily routine. We also walk through a sample regimen using Advanced Age-Defy Formula and Deep Renewal Collagen Powder, plus realistic timelines for noticing changes (typically 8–12 weeks in clinical trials).

articles.title: A 90-Day Plan to Soften Fine Lines & Wrinkles
articles.excerpt: Follow this three-month roadmap combining targeted supplementation, skincare, and sleep habits to visibly improve fine lines.
articles.body:
Most meaningful skin changes take at least 8–12 weeks. This 90-day plan breaks that window into three simple phases. Month 1 focuses on foundations like consistent SPF, nightly cleansing, and starting a collagen- and resveratrol-rich supplement such as Advanced Age-Defy Formula. Month 2 adds Deep Renewal Collagen Powder and small upgrades to sleep quality. Month 3 is about fine-tuning: watching for changes around the eyes and mouth, tracking energy, and deciding whether to maintain or adjust your routine.

We share before-and-after checkpoints aligned with our 12-week clinical study in adults aged 40–60, so you know what kinds of changes to watch for.

articles.title: Feeling Tired in Your 50s? How to Support Natural Energy
articles.excerpt: Low energy and fatigue are common in your 50s. Learn how nutrients, sleep, and stress support can help.
articles.body:
A dip in daytime energy is one of the most common concerns people share in their 50s. Hormonal shifts, changes in sleep architecture, and nutrient gaps all play a role. In this article, we outline three pillars of energy support: foundational nutrition with Daily Longevity Multivitamin, targeted mitochondrial support with ingredients like CoQ10 and resveratrol in Advanced Age-Defy Formula, and lifestyle upgrades like light exposure and movement breaks.

We also explain when a caffeine-containing supplement like Youthful Energy + Focus may be helpful—and when a caffeine-free approach is better.

articles.title: The Sleep–Skin Connection: Why Rest Matters for Wrinkles
articles.excerpt: Poor sleep can accelerate visible skin aging. Here’s how to protect your glow overnight.
articles.body:
During deep sleep, skin blood flow increases and repair processes ramp up. Chronic sleep loss has been associated with dullness, more pronounced fine lines, and slower recovery from environmental stressors.

We walk through simple ways to improve sleep hygiene and highlight ingredients like melatonin, magnesium, and L-theanine—found in Sleep Restore Gummies—that can support more restful nights. You’ll also see how our 12-week observational study in adults 45–70 tracked improvements in perceived sleep quality and next-day alertness.

articles.title: Stay Moving, Stay Glowing: Joint & Skin Support for Active Aging
articles.excerpt: Learn how collagen, turmeric, and omega-3s work together to keep you active and support youthful-looking skin.
articles.body:
Joint comfort and skin appearance often travel together: if you’re moving comfortably, it’s easier to exercise, sleep well, and support circulation to the skin. This article explores how collagen, turmeric, and omega-3 fats can support both joints and complexion.

We highlight the role of Joint & Mobility Matrix for movement, Deep Renewal Collagen Powder for structural support, and Omega Youth Skin Oil for hydration from within, plus sample daily routines for different activity levels.

articles.title: Meet Advanced Age-Defy Formula: Our Flagship 5-in-1 Anti-Aging Supplement
articles.excerpt: Resveratrol, collagen, CoQ10, and more—see what makes our main anti-aging capsule different.
articles.body:
We created Advanced Age-Defy Formula to bring together several well-studied ingredients for healthy aging in a single, once-daily capsule. Each serving features resveratrol, collagen peptides, CoQ10, vitamin C, and supportive botanicals to address skin firmness, fine lines, and everyday vitality.

This launch article walks through the clinical rationale, including our 12-week double-blind study in adults aged 40–60, and explains how to pair the formula with other products like Deep Renewal Collagen Powder or Daily Longevity Multivitamin.

articles.title: New Radiance Starter Duo: 2-Month Intro Kit for Skin & Energy
articles.excerpt: Curious where to start? Our new Radiance Starter Duo makes it easy to try our core anti-aging formulas for 60 days.
articles.body:
The Radiance Starter Duo combines Advanced Age-Defy Formula with Deep Renewal Collagen Powder in a convenient two-month starter kit. It’s designed for people who want to target fine lines, skin firmness, and everyday energy without committing to a long or complex regimen.

In this article, we explain who the kit is best for, how to take each product, and how the introductory pricing compares with buying each bottle separately.

articles.title: Introducing the Skin + Energy Day & Night Stack
articles.excerpt: Support smoother skin and better energy with our new two-part bundle for day and night.
articles.body:
Our Skin + Energy Day & Night Stack pairs Advanced Age-Defy Formula with Sleep Restore Gummies to give your skin around-the-clock support. Take Age-Defy with breakfast to deliver resveratrol, collagen, and antioxidants, then enjoy Sleep Restore Gummies 30–60 minutes before bed to support deeper rest.

Here we share how this bundle fits into busy routines, what kinds of changes to watch for by weeks 4, 8, and 12, and who may benefit most (especially those concerned with both wrinkles and low energy).

reviews.title: Noticeably smoother skin at 10 weeks
reviews.body: I’m 52 and mainly bought this for fine lines around my eyes. Around week 8–10, I noticed my concealer wasn’t settling into creases as much. I pair this with the Deep Renewal Collagen Powder as part of the Renewed Radiance Routine.

reviews.title: Subtle but real changes in texture
reviews.body: At 55, I wasn’t expecting miracles, but my cheeks and forehead look smoother and my skin feels less dry. I follow the Renewed Radiance Routine, taking this with breakfast and collagen in my afternoon tea.

reviews.title: Helped with early fine lines
reviews.body: I’m 43 and wanted to get ahead of deeper wrinkles. After about 2 months, I noticed the fine lines on my forehead looked softer. I also like that it’s caffeine-free.

reviews.title: Solid support in my 60s
reviews.body: I’m 62 and use this more for general healthy aging than vanity. My skin looks a bit brighter and my energy is steadier when I’m consistent.

reviews.title: Gentle lift in energy without jitters
reviews.body: I’m sensitive to caffeine, so I was happy to find something that supports energy without stimulants. I feel a little more "even" throughout the day.

reviews.title: Hair, nails, and skin all improved
reviews.body: After 3 months, my nails are stronger and my skin feels more hydrated. I add a scoop to my morning coffee.

reviews.title: Helps my knees too
reviews.body: I originally bought this for my skin but noticed my knees feel less stiff on hikes.

reviews.title: Big help on long workdays
reviews.body: This has replaced my second cup of coffee. I feel more focused in the afternoons without the crash.

reviews.title: Too much caffeine for me
reviews.body: It definitely works, but I’m a bit sensitive to caffeine. I now take only one capsule instead of two.

reviews.title: Falling asleep faster
reviews.body: I’m usually out within 20–30 minutes now, and I don’t wake up groggy.

reviews.title: Calmer evenings, better sleep
reviews.body: I feel less wired at night and it pairs nicely with the Sleep Restore Gummies.

reviews.title: Walking feels easier
reviews.body: After about 6 weeks my morning stiffness is noticeably better. I’m back to daily walks.

study_products.notes: Participants received one daily serving of Advanced Age-Defy Formula for 12 weeks.
Daily collagen powder with vitamin C and hyaluronic acid for 16 weeks.
Caffeine-containing energy supplement used in the active arm.
Nightly melatonin and magnesium-based gummy used for 12 weeks.
Advanced Age-Defy Formula cited as an example of a resveratrol-containing supplement.
Daily Longevity Multivitamin referenced in the context of foundational nutrient support.
